name: loom-storyboard
description: Build tooling for The Loom (loom/master-storyboard.jsx). Scoped to loom/ only -- the rest of the pixai-gallery-backup repo has no Node/npm toolchain. Bundles master-storyboard.jsx (+ loom-core.js) into loom/dist/ via esbuild as an ADDITIONAL delivery path; the existing in-browser Babel-standalone transpile (served by pixai_gallery.py's /loom route) is unchanged and remains the default/fallback.
